entities.description: As a subsection of 'Hardware Resources', this section provides detailed information about the ROM (Read-Only Memory) hardware resource included on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, which is part of the broader hardware specification outlined in the document.

Refers to the Read-Only Memory component, which is a type of non-volatile memory used for storing firmware or software that is permanently written and not easily modified, as described in section 1.2.

relations.description: The concept of 'ROM' is the primary topic of section 1.2.
